title: stelis allenii
intro: Stelis allenii, also known as the Allen's stelis, is a species of orchid native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis allenii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant properties. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its aerial parts can be used in herbal preparations to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
